old.fallback: Send An Urgent Sms Alert And Notify The Operations Manager

new.fallback: Escalate The Issue To The Operations Manager And Send An Urgent Sms Alert

old.failure_message: Send An Urgent Sms Alert And Notify The Operations Manager

new.failure_message: Escalate The Issue To The Operations Manager And Send An Urgent Sms Alert

after_hours_flow_summary.old: After Hours Emergencies Are Routed To On-Call Technician. If Unavailable, Send An Urgent Sms Alert And Notify The Operations Manager
after_hours_flow_summary.new: After Hours Emergencies Are Routed To Senior On-Call Technician. If Unavailable, Escalate The Issue To The Operations Manager And Send An Urgent Sms Alert

office_hours_flow_summary.old: Collect The Caller'S Name, Phone Number, And Service Address Before Scheduling A Technician
office_hours_flow_summary.new: The Receptionist Should Greet The Caller, Identify The Issue, Collect The Caller’S Name, Phone Number, And Service Address, And Route The Request To The Scheduling Coordinator
